## What's Changed

- Added HDMI 720p as a lighter transcode profile for players that need smoother playback.
- Added HEVC hardware transcode support for Tube TV and local streams when FFmpeg exposes compatible hardware encoders.
- Added codec-aware Tube TV HLS sessions so H264 and HEVC streams do not collide in the live segment cache.
- Added server clock metadata to Tube TV lineups so players can keep the guide channel synced to the server timeline.
- Improved Tube TV HLS segment URLs so profile, codec, and fallback profile requests carry through each live segment.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```
